# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

imports:
- path: templates/network.jinja
- path: templates/firewall.jinja
- path: templates/instance-template.jinja
- path: templates/instance-group.jinja
- path: templates/health-check.jinja
- path: templates/backend-service.jinja
- path: templates/url-map.jinja
- path: templates/http-proxy.jinja
- path: templates/forwarding-rule.jinja
- path: templates/sql.jinja
- path: templates/storage.jinja

resources:
- name: app-network
  type: templates/network.jinja
  properties:
    networkName: app-network
    autoCreateSubnetworks: false
    subnetName: app-subnet
    region: us-central1
    ipCidrRange: 10.10.0.0/24

- name: app-firewall
  type: templates/firewall.jinja
  properties:
    network: $(ref.app-network.networkSelfLink)
    rules:
    - name: allow-http
      direction: INGRESS
      priority: 1000
      sourceRanges:
      - 0.0.0.0/0
      allowed:
      - IPProtocol: tcp
        ports:
        - "80"
      targetTags:
      - web
    - name: allow-health-check
      direction: INGRESS
      priority: 1000
      sourceRanges:
      - 130.211.0.0/22
      - 35.191.0.0/16
      allowed:
      - IPProtocol: tcp
        ports:
        - "80"
      targetTags:
      - web
    - name: allow-internal
      direction: INGRESS
      priority: 1000
      sourceRanges:
      - 10.10.0.0/24
      allowed:
      - IPProtocol: tcp
        ports:
        - "0-65535"
      - IPProtocol: udp
        ports:
        - "0-65535"

- name: app-instance-template
  type: templates/instance-template.jinja
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    machineType: e2-medium
    sourceImage: projects/debian-cloud/global/images/family/debian-12
    network: $(ref.app-network.networkSelfLink)
    subnetwork: $(ref.app-network.subnetworkSelfLink)
    tags:
    - web
    startupScript: |
      #!/bin/bash
      apt-get update
      apt-get install -y nginx
      cat >/var/www/html/index.html <<EOF
      <html><body><h1>GCP MVP App Stack</h1></body></html>
      EOF
      systemctl enable nginx
      systemctl restart nginx

- name: app-instance-group
  type: templates/instance-group.jinja
  properties:
    zone: us-central1-a
    baseInstanceName: app
    targetSize: 2
    instanceTemplate: $(ref.app-instance-template.selfLink)

- name: app-health-check
  type: templates/health-check.jinja
  properties:
    port: 80
    requestPath: /

- name: app-backend-service
  type: templates/backend-service.jinja
  properties:
    healthCheck: $(ref.app-health-check.selfLink)
    instanceGroup: $(ref.app-instance-group.instanceGroupSelfLink)
    balancingMode: UTILIZATION
    maxUtilization: 0.8

- name: app-url-map
  type: templates/url-map.jinja
  properties:
    defaultService: $(ref.app-backend-service.selfLink)

- name: app-http-proxy
  type: templates/http-proxy.jinja
  properties:
    urlMap: $(ref.app-url-map.selfLink)

- name: app-forwarding-rule
  type: templates/forwarding-rule.jinja
  properties:
    portRange: "80"
    target: $(ref.app-http-proxy.selfLink)

- name: app-sql
  type: templates/sql.jinja
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    databaseVersion: POSTGRES_15
    tier: db-custom-1-3840
    rootPassword: change-me-securely
    databaseName: appdb
    userName: appuser
    userPassword: change-me-app-user

- name: app-storage
  type: templates/storage.jinja
  properties:
    bucketName: gcp-mvp-app-storage
    location: US
    storageClass: STANDARD

---
resources:
- name: {{ properties["networkName"] }}
  type: compute.v1.network
  properties:
    autoCreateSubnetworks: {{ properties.get("autoCreateSubnetworks", false) }}

- name: {{ properties["subnetName"] }}
  type: compute.v1.subnetwork
  properties:
    region: {{ properties["region"] }}
    network: $(ref.{{ properties["networkName"] }}.selfLink)
    ipCidrRange: {{ properties["ipCidrRange"] }}

outputs:
- name: networkSelfLink
  value: $(ref.{{ properties["networkName"] }}.selfLink)
- name: subnetworkSelfLink
  value: $(ref.{{ properties["subnetName"] }}.selfLink)

---
resources:
{% for rule in properties["rules"] %}
- name: {{ rule["name"] }}
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: {{ properties["network"] }}
    direction: {{ rule.get("direction", "INGRESS") }}
    priority: {{ rule.get("priority", 1000) }}
    sourceRanges:
{% for range in rule.get("sourceRanges", []) %}
    - {{ range }}
{% endfor %}
    allowed:
{% for allow in rule.get("allowed", []) %}
    - IPProtocol: {{ allow["IPProtocol"] }}
{% if "ports" in allow %}
      ports:
{% for port in allow["ports"] %}
      - "{{ port }}"
{% endfor %}
{% endif %}
{% endfor %}
{% if "targetTags" in rule %}
    targetTags:
{% for tag in rule["targetTags"] %}
    - {{ tag }}
{% endfor %}
{% endif %}
{% endfor %}

---
resources:
- name: {{ env["name"] }}
  type: compute.v1.instanceTemplate
  properties:
    properties:
      machineType: {{ properties["machineType"] }}
      tags:
        items:
{% for tag in properties.get("tags", []) %}
        - {{ tag }}
{% endfor %}
      disks:
      - deviceName: boot
        type: PERSISTENT
        boot: true
        autoDelete: true
        initializeParams:
          sourceImage: {{ properties["sourceImage"] }}
      networkInterfaces:
      - network: {{ properties["network"] }}
        subnetwork: {{ properties["subnetwork"] }}
        accessConfigs:
        - name: External NAT
          type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT
      metadata:
        items:
        - key: startup-script
          value: |
{{ properties["startupScript"]|indent(12, true) }}
      serviceAccounts:
      - email: default
        scopes:
        - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform

outputs:
- name: selfLink
  value: $(ref.{{ env["name"] }}.selfLink)

---
resources:
- name: {{ env["name"] }}
  type: compute.v1.instanceGroupManager
  properties:
    zone: {{ properties["zone"] }}
    baseInstanceName: {{ properties["baseInstanceName"] }}
    targetSize: {{ properties["targetSize"] }}
    instanceTemplate: {{ properties["instanceTemplate"] }}

outputs:
- name: selfLink
  value: $(ref.{{ env["name"] }}.selfLink)
- name: instanceGroupSelfLink
  value: $(ref.{{ env["name"] }}.instanceGroup)

---
resources:
- name: {{ env["name"] }}
  type: compute.v1.httpHealthCheck
  properties:
    port: {{ properties.get("port", 80) }}
    requestPath: {{ properties.get("requestPath", "/") }}

outputs:
- name: selfLink
  value: $(ref.{{ env["name"] }}.selfLink)

---
resources:
- name: {{ env["name"] }}
  type: compute.v1.backendService
  properties:
    protocol: HTTP
    portName: http
    timeoutSec: 30
    healthChecks:
    - {{ properties["healthCheck"] }}
    backends:
    - group: {{ properties["instanceGroup"] }}
      balancingMode: {{ properties.get("balancingMode", "UTILIZATION") }}
      maxUtilization: {{ properties.get("maxUtilization", 0.8) }}

outputs:
- name: selfLink
  value: $(ref.{{ env["name"] }}.selfLink)

---
resources:
- name: {{ env["name"] }}
  type: compute.v1.urlMap
  properties:
    defaultService: {{ properties["defaultService"] }}

outputs:
- name: selfLink
  value: $(ref.{{ env["name"] }}.selfLink)

---
resources:
- name: {{ env["name"] }}
  type: compute.v1.targetHttpProxy
  properties:
    urlMap: {{ properties["urlMap"] }}

outputs:
- name: selfLink
  value: $(ref.{{ env["name"] }}.selfLink)

---
resources:
- name: {{ env["name"] }}
  type: compute.v1.globalForwardingRule
  properties:
    portRange: {{ properties.get("portRange", "80") }}
    IPProtocol: TCP
    target: {{ properties["target"] }}

outputs:
- name: selfLink
  value: $(ref.{{ env["name"] }}.selfLink)
- name: ipAddress
  value: $(ref.{{ env["name"] }}.IPAddress)

---
resources:
- name: {{ env["name"] }}-instance
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.instance
  properties:
    region: {{ properties["region"] }}
    databaseVersion: {{ properties["databaseVersion"] }}
    settings:
      tier: {{ properties["tier"] }}
      ipConfiguration:
        ipv4Enabled: true
      backupConfiguration:
        enabled: true
    rootPassword: {{ properties["rootPassword"] }}

- name: {{ env["name"] }}-database
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.database
  properties:
    name: {{ properties["databaseName"] }}
    instance: $(ref.{{ env["name"] }}-instance.name)

- name: {{ env["name"] }}-user
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.user
  properties:
    name: {{ properties["userName"] }}
    instance: $(ref.{{ env["name"] }}-instance.name)
    password: {{ properties["userPassword"] }}

outputs:
- name: instanceConnectionName
  value: $(ref.{{ env["name"] }}-instance.connectionName)
- name: publicIp
  value: $(ref.{{ env["name"] }}-instance.ipAddresses[0].ipAddress)

---
resources:
- name: {{ properties["bucketName"] }}
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    location: {{ properties["location"] }}
    storageClass: {{ properties.get("storageClass", "STANDARD") }}
    versioning:
      enabled: false

outputs:
- name: bucketName
  value: {{ properties["bucketName"] }}
- name: selfLink
  value: $(ref.{{ properties["bucketName"] }}.selfLink)
